The game is built in a modified version of the CryEngine and will launch with Oculus Rift support.

Chairman, Chris Roberts, answers subscribers questions.


Cloud Imperium Games is the prime developer of the persistent-world game "Star Citizen" and its companion single-player spaceflight sim, "Squadron 42."
